title: Anthropic halts Claude Fable 5 and sparks debate over technological sovereignty
summary: The closure of the development of Fable 5 by Anthropic generates tensions with the White House and Amazon, and revives the debate on European sovereignty in artificial intelligence.

title: Warnings about the artificial intelligence bubble
summary: Executives and analysts warn of the imminent burst of the AI bubble, with massive layoffs and concentration of profits.

title: Coverage of the 2026 World Cup: guides, streaming and business perspective
summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup draws attention with match schedules, online DTT options, and the vision of the CEO of the US federation.

title: Wave of cyberattacks and online scams
summary: Security alerts warn about malicious Chrome extensions, backdoors in WordPress, scams on Facebook, and exploitation of VPN flaws.

title: UK considers banning social media for under-16s
summary: The British government plans to ban teenagers' access to social media to improve their mental health, while Spain observes the model.

title: Orbio raises 21 million for AI-powered recruitment
summary: Madrid-based startup Orbio automates personnel selection using artificial intelligence and receives funding for expansion.

title: Vodafone launches cheaper roaming for summer 2026
summary: The operator reduces the price of its roaming bundles in destinations like the United States, Mexico, Japan, and several countries in Asia and Africa.

title: AMD questions MacBook Neo gaming performance
summary: AMD criticizes the lack of native games, low storage capacity, and few ports of Apple's affordable laptop.

title: New generative AI models and tools
summary: Apple presents its foundational models, Rio de Janeiro launches an LLM, Microsoft develops Mirage for video, and Google Cloud launches Open Knowledge Format.

title: Wine 11.11 and SteamOS 3.8.9 Beta improve game compatibility
summary: The new versions of Wine and SteamOS fix audio errors, screen tearing, and improve overall stability for gaming on Linux.

title: US reaches peace agreement with Iran
summary: The United States and Tehran sign an agreement that restores the situation prior to the start of the war.

title: YouTube in shock after helicopter crash deaths of Gaspi, Oliver Tree, and Lucas Vignale
summary: The famous YouTubers die in a helicopter crash, generating expressions of grief from Ibai, ElRubius, and other creators.

title: NASA seeks funding to solve one of the greatest mysteries of the cosmos
summary: The space agency has a plan to unravel a cosmic enigma but lacks the necessary budget.

title: World's leading expert warns of Gulf Stream collapse
summary: The weakening of the Atlantic current caused by the ocean itself threatens catastrophic climate changes.

title: Chinese study criticizes NASA based on spacecraft that never existed
summary: The report that supposedly discredited NASA contained a fundamental error: the spacecraft that was the subject of criticism was never built.

title: Plastic recycling may not be as effective as previously thought
summary: An analysis suggests that decades of plastic recycling have had a limited real impact.

title: Korean youth turn to apps that sell nothing for a dopamine fix
summary: Korean Gen Z finds satisfaction in apps that offer content without commercial transactions, given the high cost of living.

title: DTT will require retuning televisions in 2026 for a new channel
summary: The Spanish government announces the addition of a new DTT channel that will require retuning televisions shortly.

title: Trial overturned for misuse of AI by prosecution and defense
summary: The judge cancels the trial and fines both parties after discovering they used generative artificial intelligence in their arguments.

title: Microsoft CEO demands Xbox become profitable after 25 years of losses
summary: Satya Nadella gives an ultimatum to the Xbox division to start generating profits or face consequences.
